purpose.zh: 组织起航程序、显示级别旗和起航信号、记录起航情况。
purpose.en: Runs the starting sequence, displays class and starting signals, and records starting incidents.

preparation.zh: 必须有；建议使用稳定、甲板空间充足的工作船、双体船或较大快艇。
preparation.en: Required; use a stable workboat, catamaran, or larger powerboat with enough deck space.

purpose.zh: 确定起点线左侧端点，显示橙旗并协助观察抢航。
purpose.en: Defines the pin end of the starting line, displays an orange flag, and helps observe OCS boats.

preparation.zh: 必须有；需要能稳定停位、视野清楚。
preparation.en: Required; must hold position reliably with a clear line of sight.

purpose.zh: 布标、移标、换标，并在标位显示相关信号。
purpose.en: Lays, moves, and replaces marks, and displays mark-rounding or course-change signals.

preparation.zh: 按标位配置；需要机动性强，能装载浮标和锚具。
preparation.en: Configure by mark station; should be maneuverable and able to carry marks and ground tackle.

purpose.zh: 显示终点蓝旗，记录完赛名次和终点情况。
purpose.en: Displays the blue finish flag and records finishing order and finish-line incidents.

preparation.zh: 可单独设置，也可按航行细则由其他船兼任。
preparation.en: May be a separate vessel or combined with another vessel according to the sailing instructions.

purpose.zh: 水上观察犯规、执行水上制裁或规则 42 判罚。
purpose.en: Observes incidents afloat and conducts on-water judging or Rule 42 penalties.

preparation.zh: 按仲裁数量配置；应使用速度最快、机动性最好的快艇之一。
preparation.en: Configure by number of jury boats; use one of the fastest and most maneuverable powerboats.

purpose.zh: 标识竞赛委员会船或岸上官方信号区域。
purpose.en: Identifies Race Committee boats or the official signal area ashore.

preparation.zh: 所有竞赛委员会船固定悬挂；岸上信号区建议配备。
preparation.en: Fixed on every Race Committee boat; recommended for the official signal area ashore.

purpose.zh: 标识仲裁船或抗议委员会船。
purpose.en: Identifies a jury or protest committee boat.

preparation.zh: 每条仲裁船 1 面。
preparation.en: One per jury boat.

purpose.zh: 标明信号适用的比赛级别。
purpose.en: Identifies the class to which a signal applies.

preparation.zh: 按输入的级别准备；不同赛事的级别旗不同。
preparation.en: Prepare according to the entered classes; class flags vary by event.

purpose.zh: 标识起点线端点。
purpose.en: Identifies an end of the starting line.

preparation.zh: 起航船和起点左侧船必备。
preparation.en: Required on the starting vessel and pin-end vessel.

purpose.zh: 普通起航预备信号。
purpose.en: Preparatory signal for a standard start.

preparation.zh: 起航船必备。
preparation.en: Required on the starting vessel.

purpose.zh: U 旗起航规则预备信号。
purpose.en: Preparatory signal for the U flag starting rule.

preparation.zh: 起航船必备。
preparation.en: Required on the starting vessel.

purpose.zh: 黑旗起航规则预备信号。
purpose.en: Preparatory signal for the black flag starting rule.

preparation.zh: 起航船必备；这是裁判船使用的大信号旗，不等同于仲裁手旗。
preparation.en: Required on the starting vessel; this is a large signal flag and is not the same as a jury hand flag.

purpose.zh: 推迟或暂停比赛程序。
purpose.en: Postpones or pauses the race procedure.

preparation.zh: 起航船、终点船和岸上信号区建议常备。
preparation.en: Recommended for the starting vessel, finishing vessel, and shore signal area.

purpose.zh: 个别召回，俗称单招。
purpose.en: Individual recall.

preparation.zh: 起航船必备。
preparation.en: Required on the starting vessel.

purpose.zh: 全体召回，俗称全招。
purpose.en: General recall.

preparation.zh: 起航船必备。
preparation.en: Required on the starting vessel.

purpose.zh: 召集、跟随或提示查看公告。
purpose.en: Signals come within hail, follow, or check notices.

preparation.zh: 起航船和岸上信号区建议常备。
preparation.en: Recommended for the starting vessel and shore signal area.

purpose.zh: 取消已经起航的比赛。
purpose.en: Abandons a race that has started.

preparation.zh: 起航船、终点船和岸上信号区建议常备。
preparation.en: Recommended for the starting vessel, finishing vessel, and shore signal area.

purpose.zh: 缩短航程。
purpose.en: Shortens the course.

preparation.zh: 终点船和可能缩短航程的标艇建议准备。
preparation.en: Recommended for the finishing vessel and mark boats where a shortened course may be signalled.

purpose.zh: 通常与 AP 或 N 组合，表示今天不再比赛。
purpose.en: Usually used with AP or N to indicate no more racing today.

preparation.zh: 起航船、终点船和岸上信号区建议常备。
preparation.en: Recommended for the starting vessel, finishing vessel, and shore signal area.

purpose.zh: 通常与 AP 或 N 组合，表示回岸或岸上等待。
purpose.en: Usually used with AP or N to indicate return ashore or await further signals ashore.

preparation.zh: 起航船、终点船和岸上信号区建议常备。
preparation.en: Recommended for the starting vessel, finishing vessel, and shore signal area.

purpose.zh: 表示终点船在终点位置。
purpose.en: Indicates that the finishing vessel is on station.

preparation.zh: 终点船必备。
preparation.en: Required on the finishing vessel.

purpose.zh: 用于抗议时限相关提示，具体按航行细则执行。
purpose.en: Used for protest time-limit information, according to the sailing instructions.

preparation.zh: 终点船、岸上信号区或仲裁区按赛事要求准备。
preparation.en: Prepare for the finishing vessel, shore signal area, or jury area as required by the event.

purpose.zh: 表示本船或物体代替缺失的标，或在该标位置执行标的功能。
purpose.en: Indicates that the object displaying it replaces a missing mark.

preparation.zh: 标艇建议准备。
preparation.en: Recommended for mark boats.

purpose.zh: 改变下一航段，通常与方向或长度信号配合。
purpose.en: Changes the next leg, usually with direction or length signals.

preparation.zh: 启用 C 旗或换标系统时必须准备。
preparation.en: Required when flag C or course-change procedures are used.

purpose.zh: 与 C 旗配合，表示下一航段方向改变。
purpose.en: Used with flag C to indicate a direction change for the next leg.

preparation.zh: 启用 C 旗或换标系统时准备。
preparation.en: Prepare when flag C or course-change procedures are used.

purpose.zh: 与 C 旗配合，表示下一航段方向改变。
purpose.en: Used with flag C to indicate a direction change for the next leg.

preparation.zh: 启用 C 旗或换标系统时准备。
preparation.en: Prepare when flag C or course-change procedures are used.

purpose.zh: 与 C 旗配合，表示下一航段变长。
purpose.en: Used with flag C to indicate a longer next leg.

preparation.zh: 启用 C 旗或换标系统时准备。
preparation.en: Prepare when flag C or course-change procedures are used.

purpose.zh: 与 C 旗配合，表示下一航段变短。
purpose.en: Used with flag C to indicate a shorter next leg.

preparation.zh: 启用 C 旗或换标系统时准备。
preparation.en: Prepare when flag C or course-change procedures are used.

purpose.zh: 规则 42 相关信号，是否使用取决于级别和航行细则。
purpose.en: Rule 42 related signal; use depends on class rules and sailing instructions.

preparation.zh: 启用规则 42/O-R 系统时准备。
preparation.en: Prepare when Rule 42/O-R signalling is enabled.

purpose.zh: 规则 42 相关信号，是否使用取决于级别和航行细则。
purpose.en: Rule 42 related signal; use depends on class rules and sailing instructions.

preparation.zh: 启用规则 42/O-R 系统时准备。
preparation.en: Prepare when Rule 42/O-R signalling is enabled.

purpose.zh: 岸上常用于表示可以离岸/下水，具体按航行细则执行。
purpose.en: Often used ashore to release boats to go afloat, according to the sailing instructions.

preparation.zh: 岸上信号区按赛事要求准备。
preparation.en: Prepare for the shore signal area as required by the event.

purpose.zh: 个人浮力装备相关信号，具体按航行细则执行。
purpose.en: Personal flotation device signal, according to the sailing instructions.

preparation.zh: 岸上信号区按赛事要求准备。
preparation.en: Prepare for the shore signal area as required by the event.

purpose.zh: 水上仲裁手旗之一，由仲裁员手持显示。
purpose.en: On-water jury hand flag, displayed by hand.

preparation.zh: 启用水上仲裁时，每条仲裁船准备 1 面；短旗杆、小一号，不与起航船大旗混用。
preparation.en: One per jury boat when on-water judging is enabled; short pole, smaller size, not interchangeable with large starting vessel flags.

purpose.zh: 水上仲裁手旗之一，由仲裁员手持显示。
purpose.en: On-water jury hand flag, displayed by hand.

preparation.zh: 启用水上仲裁时，每条仲裁船准备 1 面；短旗杆、小一号，不与起航船黑旗混用。
preparation.en: One per jury boat when on-water judging is enabled; short pole, smaller size, not interchangeable with the starting vessel black flag.

purpose.zh: 水上仲裁手旗之一，由仲裁员手持显示。
purpose.en: On-water jury hand flag, displayed by hand.

preparation.zh: 启用水上仲裁时，每条仲裁船准备 1 面；短旗杆、小一号。
preparation.en: One per jury boat when on-water judging is enabled; short pole, smaller size.

purpose.zh: 规则 42 水上判罚手旗，由仲裁员手持显示。
purpose.en: Rule 42 on-water penalty hand flag, displayed by hand.

preparation.zh: 启用规则 42 仲裁判罚时，每条仲裁船准备 1 面；短旗杆、小一号。
preparation.en: One per jury boat when Rule 42 judging is enabled; short pole, smaller size.

purpose.zh: 安装和展示信号旗。
purpose.en: Mounts and displays signal flags.

preparation.zh: 建议一旗一杆。
preparation.en: Prefer one pole per flag.

purpose.zh: 固定旗杆。
purpose.en: Holds flag poles in place.

preparation.zh: 按同时展示的旗数量准备；起航船需要更多。
preparation.en: Prepare according to the number of flags displayed at one time; the starting vessel needs more.

purpose.zh: 配合起航、终点、岸上信号等升降旗动作。
purpose.en: Accompanies flag hoists and drops for starts, finishes, and shore signals.

preparation.zh: 起航船必备；终点船和岸上信号区建议准备。
preparation.en: Required on the starting vessel; recommended for the finishing vessel and shore signal area.

purpose.zh: 近距离提示、标艇沟通和仲裁水上判罚。
purpose.en: Close-range signalling, mark-boat communication, and on-water judging.

preparation.zh: 标艇、终点船和仲裁船必备。
preparation.en: Required on mark boats, finishing vessels, and jury boats.

purpose.zh: 显示航线、角度、级别、时间或临时信息。
purpose.en: Displays course, bearing, class, time, or temporary information.

preparation.zh: 起航船必备；终点船按需要准备。
preparation.en: Required on the starting vessel; optional on the finishing vessel.

purpose.zh: 书写白板信息。
purpose.en: Writes information on whiteboards.

preparation.zh: 每块白板至少配 1 支，建议有备用。
preparation.en: At least one per whiteboard, with spares recommended.

purpose.zh: 使用手机定位系统辅助布标、复核位置和共享位置。
purpose.en: Uses phone positioning to help set marks, verify positions, and share locations.

preparation.zh: 作为默认定位设备；需保证电量、网络或离线地图可用。
preparation.en: Default positioning device; ensure battery, network, or offline maps are available.

purpose.zh: 专业定位、布标和复核航线位置。
purpose.en: Dedicated positioning for mark setting and course verification.

preparation.zh: 可选；如果现场人员不会使用 GPS，可用可定位手机替代。配套准备可用备用电池。
preparation.en: Optional; phones with positioning may replace GPS if crews are not comfortable with GPS units. Include usable spare batteries.

purpose.zh: 测量风速，判断比赛条件和风速变化。
purpose.en: Measures wind speed and helps assess racing conditions.

preparation.zh: 至少起航船和关键标位准备；最好每船都有。配套准备可用备用电池。
preparation.en: At least on the starting vessel and key mark station; ideally one per boat. Include usable spare batteries.

purpose.zh: 观察风向，辅助设置航线角度。
purpose.en: Observes wind direction and helps set course angles.

preparation.zh: 起航船和标艇建议准备。
preparation.en: Recommended on the starting vessel and mark boats.

purpose.zh: 竞赛委员会、标艇、终点、仲裁和岸上之间通信。
purpose.en: Communications among Race Committee, mark boats, finish, jury, and shore.

preparation.zh: 起航船建议 2 台；其他船至少 1 台；岸上至少 1 台。
preparation.en: Two recommended on the starting vessel; at least one on every other boat and ashore.

purpose.zh: 固定记录纸，便于船上记录。
purpose.en: Holds recording sheets for use afloat.

preparation.zh: 每船至少 1 个；起航船建议 2 个；仲裁人员自用笔夹。
preparation.en: At least one per boat; two recommended on the starting vessel; jury members use clipboards.

purpose.zh: 记录起航、过标、完赛、抗议和异常情况。
purpose.en: Records starts, mark roundings, finishes, protests, and incidents.

preparation.zh: 按岗位准备并留备用。
preparation.en: Prepare by station with spares.

purpose.zh: 填写记录表和临时备注。
purpose.en: Completes recording sheets and notes.

preparation.zh: 每船和岸上岗位均需准备，建议多备。
preparation.en: Prepare for every boat and shore station, with spares.

purpose.zh: 作为单独航线标或指定标位。
purpose.en: Serves as a single course mark or mark position.

preparation.zh: 按单标数量准备。
preparation.en: Prepare according to the number of single marks.

purpose.zh: 两个浮标组成一个门标。
purpose.en: Two buoys form one gate.

preparation.zh: 每个门标按 2 个浮标准备。
preparation.en: Prepare two buoys per gate.

purpose.zh: 起点线端点或起点线标识。
purpose.en: Defines an end of the starting line.

preparation.zh: 单独列出，按航行细则准备。
preparation.en: Listed separately; prepare according to the sailing instructions.

purpose.zh: 终点线端点或终点线标识。
purpose.en: Defines an end of the finishing line.

preparation.zh: 如设置单独终点线则准备。
preparation.en: Prepare when a separate finishing line is used.

purpose.zh: 固定浮标，形成完整浮标系统。
purpose.en: Secures a buoy as a complete mark system.

preparation.zh: 每个浮标配 1 套，按水域条件准备。
preparation.en: One set per buoy, adjusted for local conditions.

purpose.zh: 连接标体、锚绳、标锚和配重。
purpose.en: Connects buoy, rode, anchor, and weight.

preparation.zh: 随浮标/锚具一套准备，应与浮标一起装箱。
preparation.en: Prepare with each mark/ground tackle set and pack together with the buoy.

purpose.zh: 固定工作船位置。
purpose.en: Holds a race-management boat on station.

preparation.zh: 每条工作船 1 套。
preparation.en: One set per working boat.

purpose.zh: 临时固定旗杆、标识和器材。
purpose.en: Temporarily fixes poles, labels, and equipment.

preparation.zh: 每条竞委会船建议 1 包。
preparation.en: One pack recommended per Race Committee boat.

purpose.zh: 临时固定和维修。
purpose.en: Temporary fixing and repairs.

preparation.zh: 每条竞委会船建议 1 卷。
preparation.en: One roll recommended per Race Committee boat.

purpose.zh: 切割扎带、绳索和胶带。
purpose.en: Cuts cable ties, rope, and tape.

preparation.zh: 每条竞委会船建议 1 把。
preparation.en: One recommended per Race Committee boat.

purpose.zh: 按船或岗位装箱管理器材。
purpose.en: Packs and manages equipment by boat or station.

preparation.zh: 每条船或每个岗位建议 1 个。
preparation.en: One recommended per boat or station.

purpose.zh: 仲裁记录观察次数或规则 42 相关动作。
purpose.en: Helps jury members count observations or Rule 42 related actions.

preparation.zh: 可选，通常由仲裁自带。
preparation.en: Optional, usually carried by jury members.

purpose.zh: 辅助记录现场情况或证据。
purpose.en: Helps record incidents or evidence.

preparation.zh: 可选，通常由仲裁自带。
preparation.en: Optional, usually carried by jury members.

purpose.zh: 辅助记录听证或现场说明。
purpose.en: Helps record hearings or verbal notes.

preparation.zh: 可选，通常由仲裁自带。
preparation.en: Optional, usually carried by jury members.

purpose.zh: 听证或复盘时还原船位关系。
purpose.en: Reconstructs boat positions during hearings or debriefs.

preparation.zh: 可选，通常由仲裁自带。
preparation.en: Optional, usually carried by jury members.

name.zh: 官方公告板/电子公告屏

purpose.zh: 发布航行细则、补充通知、分组、成绩和抗议时限。
purpose.en: Publishes sailing instructions, notices, groups, results, and protest time limits.

preparation.zh: 岸上竞赛办公室必备。
preparation.en: Required for the race office ashore.

name.zh: 岸上信号杆、旗绳、滑轮、旗夹
name.en: Shore signal mast, halyards, pulleys, clips

purpose.zh: 岸上升降信号旗。
purpose.en: Hoists and lowers shore-side signal flags.

preparation.zh: 岸上官方信号区必备。
preparation.en: Required for the official signal area ashore.
